title: Funeral Home Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the services or resources of funeral homes. Includes activities such as determining prices for services or merchandise and managing the facilities of funeral homes.

tasks.text: Consult with families or friends of the deceased to arrange funeral details, such as obituary notice wording, casket selection, or plans for services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule funerals, burials, or cremations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver death certificates to medical facilities or offices to obtain signatures from legally authorized persons.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Offer counsel and comfort to families and friends of the deceased.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor funeral service operations to ensure that they comply with applicable policies, regulations, and laws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct and supervise work of embalmers, funeral attendants, death certificate clerks, cosmetologists, or other staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Complete and maintain records, such as state-required documents, tracking documents, or product inventories.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Sell funeral services, products, or merchandise to clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and implement changes to service offerings to meet community needs or increase funeral home revenues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Respond to customer complaints, legal inquiries, payment negotiations, or other post-service matters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate contracts for prearranged funeral services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Explain goals, policies, or procedures to staff members.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule work hours for funeral home or contract employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set prices or credit terms for funeral products or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review financial statements, sales or activity reports, or other performance data to identify opportunities for cost reductions or service improvements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interview and hire new employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify skill development needs for funeral home staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or monitor administrative, support, repair, or maintenance services for funeral homes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set marketing, sales, or other financial goals for funeral service establishments and monitor progress toward these goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend or make presentations at community events to promote funeral home services or build community relationships.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate the performance of vendors, contract employees, or other service providers to ensure quality and cost-efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct market research and analyze industry trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan and implement sales promotions or other marketing strategies and activities for funeral home operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
